case_title: KUSHINSKY, MICHAIL VS KOPELEVICH, KEN AKA KIRILL

docket_entries.description: MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF KUSHINSKY, MICHAIL HEARING SET FOR MAY-23-1997 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT C
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION OF MAY-23-1997, DENIED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY KUSHINSKY, MICHAIL AS TO DEFENDANT KOPELEVICH, KEN AKA KIRILL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-22-1997 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT C
THE PLTF,MICHAIL KUSHINSKY,HAS FILED MORE THAN ONE OTHER SMALL CLAIMS ACTION ANYWHERE IN CA THIS CAL- ENDAR YR IN WHICH AMT DEMANDED IS MORE THAN $2,500
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT KOPELEVICH, KEN AKA KIRILL

DEFT TO PRODUCE PROOF OF PLTF HAVING FILED TWO OTHER CASES W/IN 12 MONTHS IN EXCESS OF $2,500.
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY KOPELEVICH, KEN AKA KIRILL AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT KUSHINSKY, MICHAIL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-29-1997 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT C

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KUSHINSKY, MICHAIL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KOPELEVICH, KEN AKA KIRILL $200.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $215.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT KOPELEVICH, KEN AKA KIRILL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT KUSHINSKY, MICHAIL STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
